expectations.text: Flags callbacks invoked under lock risking deadlocks
expectations.evidence: Finding #12 (nit) mentions forwardingCallback holds lock while calling callback, but classifies it as a documentation/lock-ordering nit, not a blocking deadlock risk. Does not flag the AttachCallback case at all.

expectations.text: Notes rcState.subscribed not resetting on tracer restart
Flags use of internal.BoolEnv instead of internal/env package
Flags test helpers in non-test files (production builds)
expectations.evidence: Finding #6 flags the exported test helpers with no build tag protection

expectations.text: Notes duplicate constant definition across packages
